---
title: "CP8 Model Input Encoding"
author: "Lincoln Chanakira"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

# Load Packages

```{r packages}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(tidytext)
library(text2vec)
library(Matrix)
library(caret)
```

# Import Preprocessed Dataset

```{r import-preprocessed-data}
preprocessed_input_path <- "../../../data/processed/linkedin_full_5865_preprocessed.csv"

linkedin_preprocessed <- read_csv(preprocessed_input_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

cat("Preprocessed dataset shape:", dim(linkedin_preprocessed), "\n")
glimpse(linkedin_preprocessed)
head(linkedin_preprocessed)
```

# Helper Functions

```{r helper-functions}
clean_text_for_tfidf <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", as.character(x))
  x <- tolower(x)
  x <- gsub("[\r\n\t]+", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("[[:punct:]]+", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("[[:digit:]]+", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x)
  trimws(x)
}

parse_skills_list <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", as.character(x))
  x <- trimws(x)

  if (length(x) == 0 || x == "" || x %in% c("character(0)", "list()", "[]", "NA")) {
    return(character(0))
  }

  x <- gsub("^c\\(", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\)$", "", x)
  x <- gsub("^\\[|\\]$", "", x)
  x <- gsub("'", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\"", "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s*[,;|]\\s*", ",", x)

  parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, ","))
  parts <- trimws(parts)
  parts <- tolower(parts)
  parts <- parts[parts != ""]
  unique(parts)
}
```

# Clean Text and Parse Skills

```{r clean-text-and-parse-skills}
linkedin_encoded <- linkedin_preprocessed |>
  mutate(
    profile_text = clean_text_for_tfidf(profile_text),
    parsed_skills = map(skills_list, parse_skills_list)
  )

linkedin_encoded |>
  select(profile_text, skills_list, parsed_skills, skill_count) |>
  head()
```

# Build Skill Vocabulary

```{r build-skill-vocabulary}
skill_frequency <- linkedin_encoded |>
  select(parsed_skills) |>
  unnest(parsed_skills) |>
  count(parsed_skills, sort = TRUE, name = "frequency")

cat("Total unique skills before filtering:", nrow(skill_frequency), "\n")
head(skill_frequency, 20)
```

# Filter Rare Skills

```{r filter-rare-skills}
min_skill_frequency <- 10

retained_skills <- skill_frequency |>
  filter(frequency >= min_skill_frequency) |>
  pull(parsed_skills)

cat("Number of retained skills:", length(retained_skills), "\n")

linkedin_encoded <- linkedin_encoded |>
  mutate(
    retained_skill_list = map(parsed_skills, ~ .x[.x %in% retained_skills]),
    retained_skill_count = map_int(retained_skill_list, length)
  )

linkedin_encoded |>
  summarise(
    total_profiles = n(),
    profiles_with_any_retained_skill = sum(retained_skill_count > 0),
    avg_retained_skill_count = mean(retained_skill_count),
    median_retained_skill_count = median(retained_skill_count)
  )
```

# Create Multi-Label Target Matrix

```{r create-target-matrix}
n_rows <- nrow(linkedin_encoded)
n_skills <- length(retained_skills)

y_matrix <- matrix(0L, nrow = n_rows, ncol = n_skills)
colnames(y_matrix) <- retained_skills

for (i in seq_len(n_rows)) {
  skills_i <- linkedin_encoded$retained_skill_list[[i]]

  if (length(skills_i) > 0) {
    matched_cols <- match(skills_i, colnames(y_matrix))
    matched_cols <- matched_cols[!is.na(matched_cols)]

    if (length(matched_cols) > 0) {
      y_matrix[i, matched_cols] <- 1L
    }
  }
}

y_df <- as_tibble(y_matrix)

cat("Target matrix dimensions:", dim(y_matrix), "\n")
y_df |>
  select(1:min(10, ncol(y_df))) |>
  head()
```

# Build TF-IDF Matrix from Profile Text

```{r build-tfidf-matrix}
stop_words_vector <- tidytext::stop_words$word

tokens_iterator <- itoken(
  linkedin_encoded$profile_text,
  tokenizer = word_tokenizer,
  progressbar = FALSE
)

vocabulary <- create_vocabulary(
  tokens_iterator,
  ngram = c(1L, 2L),
  stopwords = stop_words_vector
)

vocabulary <- prune_vocabulary(
  vocabulary,
  term_count_min = 5,
  doc_proportion_max = 0.95
)

vectorizer <- vocab_vectorizer(vocabulary)

tokens_iterator <- itoken(
  linkedin_encoded$profile_text,
  tokenizer = word_tokenizer,
  progressbar = FALSE
)

dtm <- create_dtm(tokens_iterator, vectorizer)

tfidf_transformer <- TfIdf$new()
tfidf_matrix <- fit_transform(dtm, tfidf_transformer)

max_features <- 5000

if (ncol(tfidf_matrix) > max_features) {
  term_scores <- colSums(tfidf_matrix)
  top_term_indices <- order(term_scores, decreasing = TRUE)[1:max_features]
  tfidf_matrix <- tfidf_matrix[, top_term_indices]
}

cat("TF-IDF matrix dimensions:", dim(tfidf_matrix), "\n")
```

# Align Inputs and Targets

```{r align-inputs-targets}
stopifnot(nrow(tfidf_matrix) == nrow(y_df))

cat("Rows in TF-IDF matrix:", nrow(tfidf_matrix), "\n")
cat("Rows in target matrix:", nrow(y_df), "\n")
```

# Create 70/15/15 Train-Validation-Test Split

```{r create-train-validation-test-split}
set.seed(42)

train_index <- createDataPartition(
  linkedin_encoded$retained_skill_count > 0,
  p = 0.70,
  list = FALSE
)

train_profiles <- linkedin_encoded[train_index, ]
temp_profiles <- linkedin_encoded[-train_index, ]

X_train <- tfidf_matrix[train_index, ]
y_train <- y_df[train_index, ]

X_temp <- tfidf_matrix[-train_index, ]
y_temp <- y_df[-train_index, ]

set.seed(42)

temp_index <- createDataPartition(
  temp_profiles$retained_skill_count > 0,
  p = 0.50,
  list = FALSE
)

validation_profiles <- temp_profiles[temp_index, ]
test_profiles <- temp_profiles[-temp_index, ]

X_validation <- X_temp[temp_index, ]
X_test <- X_temp[-temp_index, ]

y_validation <- y_temp[temp_index, ]
y_test <- y_temp[-temp_index, ]

cat("Training set size:", nrow(X_train), "\n")
cat("Validation set size:", nrow(X_validation), "\n")
cat("Test set size:", nrow(X_test), "\n")
cat("Training target dimensions:", dim(y_train), "\n")
cat("Validation target dimensions:", dim(y_validation), "\n")
cat("Test target dimensions:", dim(y_test), "\n")
```

# Summary Diagnostics

```{r summary-diagnostics}
cat("Final encoded dataset summary\n")
cat("-----------------------------\n")
cat("Total profiles:", nrow(linkedin_encoded), "\n")
cat("Retained skills:", length(retained_skills), "\n")
cat("TF-IDF features:", ncol(tfidf_matrix), "\n")
cat("Training rows:", nrow(X_train), "\n")
cat("Validation rows:", nrow(X_validation), "\n")
cat("Test rows:", nrow(X_test), "\n")

top_retained_skills <- skill_frequency |>
  filter(parsed_skills %in% retained_skills) |>
  arrange(desc(frequency))

head(top_retained_skills, 20)
```

# Save Outputs

```{r save-outputs}
tfidf_output_path <- "../../../data/processed/linkedin_full_5865_tfidf.rds"
targets_output_path <- "../../../data/processed/linkedin_full_5865_multilabel_targets.csv"
split_output_path <- "../../../data/processed/train_validation_test_split.rds"

saveRDS(tfidf_matrix, tfidf_output_path)

targets_to_save <- bind_cols(
  linkedin_encoded |> select(linkedin_url),
  y_df
)

write_csv(targets_to_save, targets_output_path)

split_objects <- list(
  train_index = train_index,
  temp_index = temp_index,
  X_train = X_train,
  X_validation = X_validation,
  X_test = X_test,
  y_train = y_train,
  y_validation = y_validation,
  y_test = y_test,
  train_profiles = train_profiles,
  validation_profiles = validation_profiles,
  test_profiles = test_profiles,
  retained_skills = retained_skills
)

saveRDS(split_objects, split_output_path)

cat("Saved TF-IDF matrix to:", tfidf_output_path, "\n")
cat("Saved multi-label targets to:", targets_output_path, "\n")
cat("Saved train/validation/test split objects to:", split_output_path, "\n")
```
